response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and broad experience across languages and domains, but lacks explicit leadership experience in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical requirement for this role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse tech stacks and environments
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and dev-ops infrastructure setup
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML modeling, architectural design leadership, or client advisory experience
Lacks documented experience managing teams or leading client projects at executive level
